summary: Tested Admin Impersonation and Test Account Seeding features. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly.

backend_test_account_seeding.details: POST /api/admin/seed-test-accounts creates accounts for all 6 role types (Surfer, Photographer, Approved Pro, Grom, GromParent, Competitive Surfer). GET /api/admin/test-accounts lists all @test.rawsurf.io accounts. DELETE /api/admin/test-accounts/cleanup removes old accounts.

backend_impersonation.details: POST /api/admin/impersonate/start creates session and returns target user data. POST /api/admin/impersonate/{session_id}/end terminates session. GET /api/admin/impersonate/history returns session history. Admin-only access enforced.

frontend_test_accounts_tab.details: Test Accounts tab visible under Admin Console > Verification. Shows 'Seed All Roles' button, 'Cleanup Old (>7 days)' button, role badges (Surfer, Photographer, Approved Pro, Grom, GromParent, Competitive Surfer), and list of 18 existing test accounts with View As buttons.

frontend_impersonation_banner.details: ImpersonationBanner shows orange gradient bar at top with: Admin View label, target user info (name, email, role), Read-Only Mode indicator, Admin name, End Session button. Banner persists across page navigation.

frontend_view_as_flow.details: Clicking 'View As' on test account starts impersonation session. App switches to viewing as target user. Sidebar shows target user's role. Toast confirms 'Now viewing as [user]'. End Session button returns to admin view.

frontend_auth_context_impersonation.details: AuthContext correctly tracks impersonation state (isImpersonating, originalUser, impersonation session). startImpersonation and endImpersonation methods work correctly. Session persists in localStorage.

seed_data_creation: Test accounts created via /api/admin/seed-test-accounts endpoint with seed_all_roles=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Impersonation and Test Account Seeding features fully implemented and tested. Test Accounts tab is under Admin Console > Verification > Test Accounts. Impersonation banner shows orange gradient at top of app when admin is viewing as another user. 18 test accounts exist with @test.rawsurf.io emails. All backend APIs working: seed-test-accounts, list test-accounts, cleanup test-accounts, impersonate/start, impersonate/end, impersonate/history.
